title: Hangliders - Remastered
description: An early game item to glide across the land!
body:
# **Hangliders**

Made using the gravity attributes given by the newest snapshot, hangliders is the new and improved version of my old datapack Paragliders!

The Hanglider is a new early game equipment item that allows you to freely glide around the world, along with giving you a bigger jump height.

### Crafting

Craft the Hanglider using 2 wool blocks of any type (Colored Gliders Planned), 3 sticks, and one iron ingot.

The glider allows you to travel short distances in the air, and can be combined with elytra to gain much height and travel distances.
